_meta.purpose: Fixture-mode replay for the v0.13.1+ primary-source poller. Tests pass this synthesized RSS / CSAF-index content through ctx.fixtures.advisories[<feed>] to exercise the parser + de-duplication + report shape without hitting upstream feeds.
_meta.shape_note: Each feed key carries either an RSS / Atom XML string (qualys, usn, zdi, kernel-org, oss-security, jfrog, cisa-current) or a CSAF-index newline-separated filename list (rhsa). Real fetchDiff branches on feed.kind to select the parser. v0.13.3 added kernel-org, oss-security, jfrog, cisa-current.
